user.title: Electric Ireland Insights
user.description: Enter your Electric Ireland online account credentials

data_description.username: Your Electric Ireland online account email address
data_description.password: Your Electric Ireland online account password

account.title: Select Account
account.description: {num_accounts} electricity account(s) found for this login. Select which account to configure.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Electric Ireland
reauth_confirm.description: Your Electric Ireland credentials have expired. Please re-enter your password.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Electric Ireland
reconfigure.description: Update your password or clear cached meter identifiers for {username}.

data.force_rediscovery: Re-discover meter IDs from the portal

data_description.password: Your current Electric Ireland portal password (re-enter even if unchanged)
data_description.force_rediscovery: Clear cached meter identifiers (partner, contract, premise) and re-discover them from the Electric Ireland website on the next data refresh. Use this if data imports have stopped but your credentials are correct.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Electric Ireland. Please check your internet connection.
error.account_not_found: No electricity accounts found for this user.

abort.already_configured: This Electric Ireland account is already configured
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Electric Ireland during account setup
abort.account_not_found: The selected account could not be verified
